mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery (order_no, seller_no, receiver_name, receiver_hp, zip, addr1, addr2, courier, invoice_no, delivery_fee, delivery_status, memo, receipt_date) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{sellerNo}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverHp}, #{zip}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{courier}, #{invoiceNo}, #{deliveryFee}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{memo}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT delivery_no AS deliveryNo, order_no AS orderNo, seller_no AS sellerNo, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_hp AS receiverHp, zip, addr1, addr2, courier, invoice_no AS invoiceNo, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, delivery_status AS deliveryStatus, memo, receipt_date AS receiptDate, shipped_date AS shippedDate, delivered_date AS deliveredDate FROM delivery WHERE delivery_no = #{deliveryNo}

SELECT delivery_no AS deliveryNo, order_no AS orderNo, seller_no AS sellerNo, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_hp AS receiverHp, zip, addr1, addr2, courier, invoice_no AS invoiceNo, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, delivery_status AS deliveryStatus, memo, receipt_date AS receiptDate, shipped_date AS shippedDate, delivered_date AS deliveredDate FROM delivery ORDER BY delivery_no DESC

if.test: searchType != null and keyword != null and keyword != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo, d.invoice_no AS invoiceNo, d.courier AS courier, o.order_code AS orderCode, d.receiver_name AS receiverName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.delivery_no = d.delivery_no) AS itemCount, d.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, CASE WHEN o.order_status = '주문취소' THEN '주문취소' WHEN o.order_status IN ('반품진행', '반품완료', '교환진행', '교환완료') THEN o.order_status WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), d.receipt_date) >= 3 THEN '배송완료' WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), d.receipt_date) >= 1 THEN '배송중' ELSE '배송준비' END AS deliveryStatus, d.receipt_date AS receiptDate FROM delivery d JOIN orders o ON d.order_no = o.order_no
ORDER BY d.delivery_no DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delivery d JOIN orders o ON d.order_no = o.order_no

SELECT d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo, o.order_code AS orderCode, d.receiver_name AS receiverName, d.receiver_hp AS receiverHp, d.zip AS zip, d.addr1 AS addr1, d.addr2 AS addr2, d.courier AS courier, d.invoice_no AS invoiceNo, d.memo AS memo FROM delivery d JOIN orders o ON d.order_no = o.order_no WHERE d.delivery_no = #{deliveryNo}

SELECT d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo, o.order_code AS orderCode, d.receiver_name AS receiverName, d.receiver_hp AS receiverHp, d.zip AS zip, d.addr1 AS addr1, d.addr2 AS addr2, d.courier AS courier, d.invoice_no AS invoiceNo, d.memo AS memo FROM delivery d JOIN orders o ON d.order_no = o.order_no WHERE d.order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY d.delivery_no ASC

SELECT oi.product_no AS productNo, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_image AS productImage, sp.company_name AS companyName, oi.price AS price, oi.quantity AS quantity, d.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, oi.total_price AS totalPrice FROM order_item oi JOIN seller_profile sp ON oi.seller_no = sp.seller_no JOIN delivery d ON oi.delivery_no = d.delivery_no WHERE oi.delivery_no = #{deliveryNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE delivery SET courier = #{courier}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}, memo = #{memo}, delivery_status = '배송중', shipped_date = NOW() WHERE delivery_no = #{deliveryNo}
